summary: Combined product media design, Shopify execution, redesign support, and SEO/SEM collaboration inside an eCommerce growth environment.
bullets: Developed product imagery, line drawings, and ad creatives for merchandising and marketing use.
Managed Shopify uploads with SEO-optimized file naming and alt text.
Partnered with marketing leadership on website redesign and go-to-market media roadmaps.
Helped build and scale an SEO/SEM program that supported 2–5% MoM organic traffic growth and roughly 30% year-to-date visibility improvement.
